_doc:
Calibrated session capacity for POINTS-BUDGETED batches (docs/agent/backlog-workflow.md → 'Running a batch'). The batch's point budget = round(capacityPoints * targetFraction) — 'take as many points as possible up to ~half a session's worth', not a fixed item count. 'points' here = batchCost (a story's size; a task counts as 2, since tasks carry no burndown points but still consume context). `node scripts/backlog.mjs calibrate --points=

--context-pct=` updates capacityPoints via EMA from each session's observed (points resolved ÷ context fraction); the closing-session skill runs it. Seeded from batch-2026-06-10-240-195-038-194-182 (10 items, ~25 cost-pts at ~20% context → implied ~125 capacity), haircut to 100 pending the first real calibration.
